plans.description: 24-month fixed electricity contract with discounted per-unit pricing.

plans.description: Long-term 36-month fixed electricity plan for stable, predictable costs.

plans.name: Intro 6 - Fixed Electricity
plans.description: Short-term 6-month fixed plan ideal for temporary or seasonal locations.

plans.description: 12-month variable-rate electricity plan tracking market prices.

autopay_rules.name: Large electricity invoices > $2000 on due date
Sweep electricity balances  $5000 on due date

location_notes.note_text: Review contract  highest Q2 2025 electricity cost
Billing contact updated to company-wide settings on 2025-12-01.
High-usage gas alert configured at 250 units/day via email and SMS.
Site closed and all utility accounts scheduled for termination by 2024-06-30.
Test Site set to inactive; keep minimal service plans only.
